This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. _executeBurnExternal(uint256).details: External self-call entrypoint for the auto-burn try/catch wrapper.      Restricted to self-calls only; no `nonReentrant` because the parent      `receivePremium` already holds the guard.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

accumulatedUSDCSinceBurn().notice: USDC accumulated since the last auto-burn attempt (6-decimals).

gasRefundCap().notice: Maximum ETH refunded per auto-burn (in wei).

gasRefundEnabled().notice: When true, refund part of gas to the buyer that triggered the burn.

gasRefundTreasury().notice: Configured refund source (sentinel only — actual refunds drain `address(this).balance`).

initializeV2(uint256,uint256,bool,uint25.notice: One-shot initializer for the V2 upgrade. `reinitializer(2)` ensures it runs exactly once.

maxAccumulatedUSDCBeforeBurn().notice: Trigger an auto-burn when this much USDC accumulates since the last burn (6-decimals).

maxPurchasesBeforeBurn().notice: Trigger an auto-burn after this many premium receipts. 0 = disabled.

purchaseCounter().notice: Number of premium receipts since the last successful auto-burn attempt.
